items.name: ShadowVault-Decentralized-Backup-Agent
items.description: 🔐 A decentralized, privacy-preserving backup agent that snapshots directories, deduplicates content, encrypts everything client-side, and syncs over a peer-to-peer libp2p network. It delivers verifiable signed snapshots with resilient chunk-level propagation and no trusted central storage.
